mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_id, user_pw, user_name, user_email, user_addr1, user_addr2, user_zipcode) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{userEmail}, #{userAddr1}, #{userAddr2}, #{userZipcode})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_no AS userNo, user_id AS userId, user_pw AS userPw, user_name AS userName, user_email AS userEmail, user_img AS userImg, user_bio AS userBio, user_role AS userRole, user_addr1 AS userAddr1, user_addr2 AS userAddr2, user_zipcode AS userZipcode, join_date AS joinDate FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_no AS userNo, user_id AS userId, user_pw AS userPw, user_name AS userName, user_email AS userEmail, user_img AS userImg, user_bio AS userBio, user_role AS userRole, user_addr1 AS userAddr1, user_addr2 AS userAddr2, user_zipcode AS userZipcode, join_date AS joinDate FROM users WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET user_name = #{userName}, user_email = #{userEmail}, user_img = #{userImg}, user_bio = #{userBio}, user_addr1 = #{userAddr1}, user_addr2 = #{userAddr2}, user_zipcode = #{userZipcode} WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_email = #{userEmail}
SELECT user_no AS userNo, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, user_email AS userEmail FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_email = #{userEmail}
SELECT user_no AS userNo, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, user_email AS userEmail FROM users WHERE user_email = #{userEmail}
